accessibility_remediation: src/components/ui/progress.jsx now supplies a fallback aria-label when no explicit label is provided.
src/App.jsx now passes contextual aria-label values for timer, level, and achievement progressbars.
seo_remediation: index.html now includes a meta description for Routine Grove.
public/robots.txt is valid and copied into dist by the production build.
static_delivery_remediation: Hashed dist assets are served with public, max-age=31536000, immutable.
Missing asset-like paths return 404 instead of falling back to index.html.
regression_coverage: scripts/production-smoke.mjs now checks accessible progressbar fallback, SEO metadata, robots.txt, cache headers, and 404 fallback behavior.

remaining_risks: The original Lighthouse report had PROTOCOL_TIMEOUT on FullPageScreenshot and a Chrome extension performance warning; rerun Lighthouse in a clean profile to confirm updated category scores.
Performance 66 in the baseline may require a clean Lighthouse rerun before deeper JavaScript splitting decisions are justified.
